violations.text: Several foods (see disposal form) were observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

One of the two main cold hold prep units were observed in poor repair (not holding adequate ambient temperature). All food was moved to another working unit or disposed of. Unit was taken out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
There was a heavy accumulation of ice in a reach in refrigeration unit (ice was building up on fan and over food products inside). New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
The plumbing of the hand wash sink located near the drive-thru window was observed in poor repair (not allowing for adequate draining). New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2024
